title: solanum nigrum var. suffruticosum
intro: Solanum nigrum var. suffruticosum, also known as woody nightshade or black nightshade, is a perennial shrub of the Solanum nigrum species. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects, which are attributed to the presence of glycoalkaloids and other bioactive compounds. The health benefits of Solanum nigrum var. suffruticosum include its potential to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce oxidative stress. The plant can be prepared into herbal remedies such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to treat various health conditions and promote overall well-being.
